Name: Average time from Awaiting Assignment to Batch to Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Total time between Awaiting Assignment to Batch and First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Minimum time for Awaiting Assignment to Batch to be followed by Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Average time it takes Awaiting Assignment to Batch after the execution of First Look-Your updates are overdue
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look-Your updates are overdue' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Total resolution time of Awaiting Assignment to Batch when preceded by First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Time from Awaiting Assignment to Batch to the next occurrence of Manuscript Export Succeeded in variants that include both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Average time until Awaiting Assignment to Batch is performed following First Look-Please submit updates
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look-Please submit updates' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Minimum time between First Look-Your updates are due in one week and Awaiting Assignment to Batch
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'First Look-Your updates are due in one week' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Total time it takes Awaiting Assignment to Batch to be done after First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation in accepted manuscript trajectories
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Elapsed time between Awaiting Assignment to Batch and the final Manuscript Export Succeeded in end-to-end review cycles
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Average waiting time to the Awaiting Assignment to Batch activity after completion of First Look-Your updates are overdue
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look-Your updates are overdue' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Time of Awaiting Assignment to Batch in variants that conclude with RW-EIC Accept
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and the end of case where activity 'RW-EIC Accept occurs

Name: Average time from SW-EIC Accept to Awaiting Assignment to Batch
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-EIC Accept' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Minimum time it takes Awaiting Assignment to Batch after the execution of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Total time between First Look-Please submit updates and Awaiting Assignment to Batch across all process variants containing this sequence
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look-Please submit updates' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'
